Jennifer's Body (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,204,793Details
International Box Office $15,738,608
Worldwide Box Office $31,943,401
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,963,723
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,871,570
Total $8,835,293
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,868,397 (42.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.36 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$16,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,702 opening theaters/2,738 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $25,841,242

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 18th, 2009 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox

Running Time: 102 minutes
Plot point: Musicians, Occult, Rock 'n' Roll, Succubi

Target audience: Cult Movie

Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
